name: Standardized Image Preprocessing for ML
description: You are a bioimage analyst preparing a dataset for a Convolutional Neural Network (CNN). Open the 'Blobs (25K)' sample image and transform it into a standardized tensor format. Invert the image contrast so objects appear bright on a dark background. Resize the image to 128 pixels wide while maintaining the aspect ratio, then pad the canvas to exactly 256x256 pixels (centered with a black background). Save the resulting TIFF file to ~/ImageJ_Data/processed/blobs_ml_ready.tif. Login: username 'ga', password 'password123'.
